_meta.author: bankkroll
_meta.title: Pricing Card
_meta.description:
A modern, animated pricing card component with features and perks sections.

Features:
	•	Smooth animations on scroll
	•	Responsive layout
	•	Customizable content
	•	Feature/perk lists with icons
	•	Original price display (optional)
	•	Custom button action

Props:
	•	title: string
	•	description: string
	•	price: number
	•	originalPrice?: number
	•	features: PricingFeature[]
	•	buttonText?: string
	•	onButtonClick?: () => void
